metaData.Ingredients:
Active ingredients: Eucalyptol (0.099%w/v), Benzoic Acid (0.156%w/v)*, Methyl Salicylate (0.072%w/v), Thymol (0.0702%w/v), Sodium Fluoride (0.0501%w/v), Menthol (0.0425%w/v)
*Quantity based on Benzoic Acid and Sodium Benzoate.
Inactive ingredients: Water, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Poloxamer 407, Flavour, Eucalyptol, Benzoic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Methyl Salicylate, Thymol, Sodium Fluoride, Menthol, Sodium Saccharin, Sucralose, Camellia Sinensis (Green Tea) leaf extract, CI 47005, CI42053.
metaData.Key Information: Listerine Zero has a non-alcohol formula for a less intense taste and kills 99.9% of germs that brushing misses to help prevent bad breath, reduce plaque and gum problems. It has a unique formula with 4 types of essential oils which penetrates to kill bacteria in the plaque bioflim.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Rinse with 20ml undiluted Listerine each time, twice a day and expel after rinsing for 30 seconds
• Important:
1. Do not swallow
2. No further rinse with water is required
3. Children under 6 years of age are not recommended to use

product.description:
• Used twice daily after brushing, Listerine Cool Mint Zero Alcohol provides 24-hr protection and kills 99.9% of germs that cause bad breath, plaque and gum problems.
• Unique formula with 4 Essential Oils deeply penetrates to kill bacteria in the plaque biofilm
• Recommended for daily use

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Poloxamer 407, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Benzoic Acid, Eucalyptol, Sodium Benzoate, Thymol, Sodium Saccharin, Methyl Salicylate, Menthol, Flavor, Sucralose, Ci42053.
metaData.Key Information: • Used twice daily after brushing, Listerine Cool Mint Zero Alcohol provides 24-hr protection and kills 99.9% of germs that cause bad breath, plaque and gum problems.
metaData.Preparation: Use 10mL full strength for children age 6-12 years old and 20mL for adults and children above 12 years old, rinse the teeth and gums for 30 seconds, twice daily as part of usual oral hygiene. Do NOT swallow.

metaData.Ingredients:
Water, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitol, Poloxamer 407, Zinc Lactate, Flavor, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Fluoride, Lactic Acid, Sodium Saccharin, Menthol, Ci 42051.

Contains Sodium Fluoride.
metaData.Key Information:
The NEW Colgate Total Mouthwash is a 24 hour antibacterial protection^ that helps prevent oral care problems** before they start. It is designed to have long lasting preventative* benefits against the root cause of many common oral care problems*** like gum problems, plaque, bad breath, tartar and cavities.

*with regular twice daily use
**gum problems, plaque, bad breath, tartar and cavities vs using regular non-antibacterial mouthwash
***bacteria is the root cause of gum problems, plaque, bad breath, tartar and cavities
^when used every 12 hours, with 4 weeks of continued use
